title: The Picture of Dorian Gray
author: Oscar Wilde
description: A philosophical novel exploring the relationship between beauty, corruption, and morality. When young Dorian Gray has his portrait painted by Basil Hallward, he wishes that the painting would age instead of him. His wish is granted, and as Dorian pursues a life of sensual excess, the portrait bears the marks of his sins while he remains eternally youthful.
